templateVersions.content:
Data:- {!$Input:rescheduleJson}
To ensure the LLM processes this specific data structure accurately, use these direct instructions in your prompt template: Parse the input text to identify the originalDT value and the list of slots. Identify the target timestamp from the originalDT field. Iterate through every slot within the slots array to compare its startTime with the originalDT. Locate the specific slot where the startTime is an exact string match for the originalDT. Extract the resourceId and the startTime from that matching slot only. Format the output as two distinct lines: the first line containing only the Resource ID string, and the second line containing only the Start Time string. Exclude all introductory text, explanations, or labels from the final response. Return "No Match" if the originalDT does not exist within the provided list of slots.
